59.9% of subscription users pay for services they don't actively use. Most people don't catch it because bank statements are painful to read—charges hidden in different names, billing dates scattered across the month.

Here's what happens when you actually analyze your statement:

**Hidden charges surface instantly.** Leakly groups every recurring charge, shows you exactly what's draining your account—no bank login required. Privacy stays yours.
